Tesla Removes Need For Reservation To Get Foundation Series Cybertruck: Limited Edition Version Starts At $99,990
data.description: Tesla on Thursday removed the need for a reservation to get a limited-edition foundation series Cybertruck. Customers can now order it directly from the company website.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Home Depot Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings Report
data.description: Home Depot (NYSE: HD) to report Q2 earnings on Aug. 13. Analysts expect $4.50/share, down from $4.65/share last year. Dividend yield at 2.59%.

data.title: Kim Jong Un, Trump And Russian President's Look-Alike Spotted At The 2024 Olympic Games In Paris
data.description: Australian music producer Howard X, a well-known impersonator of North Korean leader Kim, was seen in Paris during the Olympics.
